The department may pay:

(1) a statutory fee required by the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles for a certified abstract or in connection with suspension of a vehicle registration; or

(2) a statutory fee payable to the comptroller for issuance of a certificate of deposit required by Section 601.122 (Deposit of Cash or Securities with Comptroller) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.023 — Payment of Statutory Fees

The department may pay:

    (1) a statutory fee required by the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles for a certified abstract or in connection with suspension of a vehicle registration; or

    (2) a statutory fee payable to the comptroller for issuance of a certificate of deposit required by Section 601.122 (Deposit of Cash or Securities with Comptroller) .

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 2J.01, eff. September 1, 2009.*
